mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id AS "taskId", t.project_id AS "projectId", t.work_order_id AS "workOrderId", t.task_type AS "taskType", t.task_kind AS "taskKind", t.form_ref AS "formRef", t.status, t.version, a.principal_id AS "responsiblePrincipalId" FROM tsk_task t LEFT JOIN tsk_task_assignment a ON a.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND a.task_id = t.task_id AND a.assignment_kind = 'RESPONSIBLE' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.task_id = #{taskId}
